title: §0Oh Despair
lines: Roll the tape, let's play it again
Back in those days, buried in sin
A whisper said "life's been unkind
Be not afraid - we can rewind."
Blood in the rain, the hammer came down
Knee-deep in shame, I cried to her cloud
She said "rise up, don't you despair -
You'll break and you'll bend, but I'll be there!"
When I stumble and fall
When visions ignite
When I want to withdraw
She joins the fight, yeah
She joins the fight, yeah!
Ooooh ooooh...
Blood in the rain, the hammer came down
Nothing but shame, I cried to hеr cloud
She said "rise up, don't fret, my friеnd."
You'll falter and fall, but this ain't the end.
I am the one who calls...
The one who calls the angels
I am the chosen friend...
Let's roll that tape again!
